title: CRM & Marketing Automation Manager (m/w/d), mit internationalem Schwerpunkt
summary: CRM and email marketing automation role with strong analytical and segmentation overlap with Boru's profile, but requires hands-on CRM tool experience (Klaviyo/HubSpot/Salesforce) and German C1 — both of which are gaps.
key_requirements: Multi-year experience in CRM, email marketing, or marketing automation (required)
Strategic and operational CRM system build-up and development experience (required)
Segmentation, automation, and personalisation of email campaigns (required)
Proficiency with CRM/email tools: CleverReach, Klaviyo, Mailchimp, Salesforce, HubSpot or equivalent (required)
Strong analytical skills to interpret campaign data and derive optimisations (required)
A/B testing execution and KPI-based campaign analysis (required)
German C1 minimum; English B2 minimum (required)
International market focus — cultural and linguistic campaign adaptation (required)
matched_skills: Campaign performance analytics and KPI tracking (IPC, GRG, Moli Media)
E-commerce and campaign ROI analytics (Moli Media live-stream e-commerce)
Multi-market campaign performance monitoring (EMEA, APAC at GRG)
Cross-functional team coordination and stakeholder reporting
missing_skills: Hands-on CRM platform experience (Klaviyo, HubSpot, Salesforce, Mailchimp, CleverReach)
Email marketing campaign planning and execution (as primary function)
Marketing automation workflow design (welcome, reactivation, upselling sequences)
E-commerce or D2C industry experience in a CRM context
Server-side or technical CRM architecture / system build-up experience
recommended_emphasis: A/B testing and experiment design capability
Customer segmentation models developed at IPC for B2B verticals
Campaign ROI analytics and KPI framework design across multiple campaigns
E-commerce funnel and audience analytics from Moli Media (live-stream e-commerce, 4,000+ attendees)
Multi-market campaign performance experience (EMEA, APAC) — aligns with international focus
Data quality and tracking QA — relevant to CRM data integrity
language_requirement: German C1 minimum required — Boru's B1+ is below threshold; this is a stated mandatory requirement
location_notes: Berlin, hybrid with several home-office days per week; Boru is in Lüneburg — manageable with hybrid model but relocation may be preferred
risk_flags: German C1 required — Boru is B1+, a gap of at least one full proficiency level
No hands-on experience with any named CRM/email automation platforms (Klaviyo, HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.)
Role requires multi-year CRM-specific experience as primary function — Boru's CRM exposure is incidental
No email campaign creation or automation workflow ownership in CV
